sections.paragraph:
νυμφικός, ή, όν (νύμφη; Aeschy., Pl. et al.; TestJud 12:1; pap) bridal τὰ ἱμάτια τὰ νυμφικά the bridal garments GJs 2:4.—DELG s.v. νύμφη.

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

TestJud TestJud = Testament of Judah, s. Test12Patr—List 2

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 680
